cases.sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT product, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders GROUP BY product ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT date_trunc('month', order_date)::date AS month, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY date_trunc('month', order_date) ORDER BY month
SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
SELECT category, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_order_amount FROM sales_orders GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_order_amount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS high_priority_closed FROM tickets WHERE LOWER(priority) = 'high' AND resolved_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND resolved_at < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT assigned_team, ROUND(AVG(resolution_hours), 1) AS avg_resolution_hours FROM tickets WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY assigned_team ORDER BY avg_resolution_hours ASC
SELECT priority, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM tickets GROUP BY priority ORDER BY ticket_count DESC
SELECT assigned_team, ROUND(AVG(resolution_hours), 1) AS avg_resolution_hours FROM tickets WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY assigned_team ORDER BY avg_resolution_hours DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT date_trunc('month', created_at)::date AS month, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM tickets WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY date_trunc('month', created_at) ORDER BY month
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM tickets WHERE LOWER(category) = 'network' GROUP BY status ORDER BY ticket_count DESC
